title: Race Pipeline Orchestrator Input
description: Configuration for the daily race pipeline orchestrator.

scraperTimeoutSecs.title: Scraper Timeout (seconds)
scraperTimeoutSecs.description: Maximum time to wait for all scrapers to finish. Default: 1800 (30 minutes).

dedupTimeoutSecs.title: Dedup Timeout (seconds)
dedupTimeoutSecs.description: Maximum time to wait for deduplication to finish. Default: 600 (10 minutes).

enricherTimeoutSecs.title: Enricher Timeout (seconds)
enricherTimeoutSecs.description: Maximum time to wait for enrichment to finish. Default: 1800 (30 minutes).

skipEnricher.title: Skip Enricher
skipEnricher.description: Skip the enrichment step (useful for faster runs or debugging).
